---
title: "Dylan Pieper"
subtitle: "Data Scientist"
toc: false
page-layout: full
title-block-style: none
---

```{=html}
<style>
#title-block-header { display: none; }
@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .main-container {
    flex-direction: column !important;
    align-items: center !important;
  }
  .image-container {
    flex: none !important;
    margin-bottom: 2rem !important;
    height: 270px !important;
    width: 270px !important;
  }
  .text-container {
    flex: none !important;
  }
  .hobby-pic-1 {
    top: 10px !important;
    right: 10px !important;
  }
  .hobby-pic-2 {
    bottom: 10px !important;
    left: 10px !important;
  }
  .hobby-pic-3 {
    top: 10px !important;
    left: 10px !important;
  }
}
</style>

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  // Initialize AOS animation library
  AOS.init({
    duration: 800,
    once: true
  });
});
</script>
```

```{=html}
<div class="main-container" style="display: flex; gap: 2rem; align-items: flex-start;">
  <div class="image-container" style="flex: 0 0 300px; position: relative; height: 300px;">
    <!-- Main headshot circle -->
    <img src="media/headshot.jpg" style="
      position: absolute;
      top: 50%;
      left: 50%;
      transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
      height: 200px;
      width: 200px;
      object-fit: cover;
      border-radius: 50%;
      border: 3px solid white;
      z-index: 2;
      transition: transform 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease;
      cursor: pointer;
    " data-aos="fade-in" onmouseover="this.style.transform='translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1.1)'; this.style.boxShadow='0 8px 25px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)'" onmouseout="this.style.transform='translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1)'; this.style.boxShadow='none'">
    
    <!-- Hobby picture 1 - top right -->
    <img class="hobby-pic-1" src="media/pg.jpg" style="
      position: absolute;
      top: 20px;
      right: 20px;
      height: 80px;
      width: 80px;
      object-fit: cover;
      border-radius: 50%;
      border: 2px solid white;
      z-index: 1;
      transition: transform 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease;
      cursor: pointer;
    " data-aos="fade-in" data-aos-delay="400" onmouseover="this.style.transform='scale(2) rotate(-3deg)'; this.style.boxShadow='0 6px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.25)'" onmouseout="this.style.transform='scale(1) rotate(0deg)'; this.style.boxShadow='none'">
    
    <!-- Hobby picture 2 - bottom left -->
    <img class="hobby-pic-2" src="media/archie.jpg" style="
      position: absolute;
      bottom: 20px;
      left: 20px;
      height: 80px;
      width: 80px;
      object-fit: cover;
      border-radius: 50%;
      border: 2px solid white;
      z-index: 1;
      transition: transform 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease;
      cursor: pointer;
    " data-aos="fade-in" data-aos-delay="600" onmouseover="this.style.transform='scale(2) rotate(3deg)'; this.style.boxShadow='0 6px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.25)'" onmouseout="this.style.transform='scale(1) rotate(0deg)'; this.style.boxShadow='none'">
    
    <!-- Hobby picture 3 - top left -->
    <img class="hobby-pic-3" src="media/married.png" style="
      position: absolute;
      top: 20px;
      left: 20px;
      height: 80px;
      width: 80px;
      object-fit: cover;
      border-radius: 50%;
      border: 2px solid white;
      z-index: 1;
      transition: transform 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease;
      cursor: pointer;
    " data-aos="fade-in" data-aos-delay="800" onmouseover="this.style.transform='scale(2) rotate(-5deg)'; this.style.boxShadow='0 6px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.25)'" onmouseout="this.style.transform='scale(1) rotate(0deg)'; this.style.boxShadow='none'">
  </div>
  <div class="text-container" style="flex: 1;">
```

[Hi, I'm Dylan!]{.tegaki size="3.5" duration="0.3"}

I'm a **data scientist** working on research, program evaluation, and business intelligence across the health sciences, education, and government. I love collaborating with teams to create meaningful data tools that look beautiful and are easy to use. I work full-stack—from the visualizations, reports, and dashboards people interact with to the models and pipelines that feed them—with reproducibility and open science as my core values.

I currently lead data strategy at a university advancing medical education. Across my career, I've turned complex, messy datasets—from APIs, surveys, and electronic health records—into actionable insights, backed by scalable databases and web apps that hold up in production.

I work primarily in **R**, **Python**, **SQL**, and **Git**, build reports and applications with **Quarto** and **Shiny**, with additional experience in **Tableau** and **Power BI**, and apply AI-driven analytics, natural language processing, and machine learning along the way.

Whether designing cloud-based architectures, automating workflows, or mentoring teams, I thrive in dynamic, cross-functional environments. My work has reached audiences worldwide through open-source packages, talks, and publications. Outside of work, I have a deep appreciation for nature and spirituality. From **paragliding** to **yoga**, I find energy and balance through exploring outer and inner landscapes.

Let's connect and explore your data in ways you never thought were possible.

```{=html}
<style>
.icon-button {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.5rem;
  padding: 0.75rem 1rem;
  border: 1px solid #ddd;
  border-radius: 4px;
  text-decoration: none;
  color: #333;
  background-color: #fff;
  transition: all 0.2s ease;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
}

.icon-button:hover {
  border-color: #4c5f75;
  color: #4c5f75;
  background-color: #f8f9fa;
  text-decoration: none;
}

.icon-button:focus {
  outline: 2px solid #4c5f75;
  outline-offset: 2px;
}
</style>

<div style="margin-top: 2rem; display: flex; gap: 1rem; flex-wrap: wrap;">
  <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/dylanpieper" class="icon-button">
    <i class="fab fa-linkedin"></i>
  </a>
  <a href="https://github.com/dylanpieper" class="icon-button">
    <i class="fab fa-github"></i>
  </a>
  <a href="https://web-cdn.bsky.app/profile/dylanpieper.bsky.social" class="icon-button">
    <i class="fab fa-bluesky"></i>
  </a>
  <a href="mailto:dylanpieper@gmail.com" class="icon-button">
    <i class="fas fa-envelope"></i>
  </a>
</div>
```

```{=html}
  </div>
</div>
```
